proTip.title: Pro Travel Tip
proTip.body: Miami heat is no joke — drink water constantly, wear sunscreen, and plan outdoor time for morning or evening. Afternoon storms are common Jun–Nov. Tipping is standard: 18–20% at restaurants, a few dollars for rideshare and hotel staff. Cards are widely accepted, but keep cash for small cafés and food trucks.

gettingAround.title: Getting Around Miami
gettingAround.description: See the full Transit section for Metromover, Metrorail, Metrobus maps and Brightline — or use the quick links below.

links.name: Transit guide
links.description: Maps, fan tips, and links for all downtown rail options.

links.name: Uber / Lyft
links.description: Best for stadium runs, Wynwood nights, and late rides home.
